item.title: MIUI OS3.0.304.0.WOBCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Pro China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Pro China

Codename: haotian

Version: OS3.0.304.0.WOBCNXM | 16.0

Size: 12.2 GB

MD5: f685dbac4dc6fb90a8b0e075ecfaf2f6

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to June 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.104.0.VOBCNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Pro China
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Codename: haotian

Changelog:

Optimization: Frame drops and stuttering issues in Honor of Kings
[System]
Optimization: System stability
Fix: Errors occurred in some cases
